title: BEM-865 inputs false markers
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
script = Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py')
json_ok = False
data = None
try:
    data = json.loads(queue.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue.exists() else None
    json_ok = True
except:
    json_ok = False
script_text = script.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if script.exists() else ''
checks = {
    'script_exists': script.exists(),
    'queue_exists': queue.exists(),
    'queue_json_ok': json_ok,
    'has_main': 'def main()' in script_text,
    'has_gh_workflow': 'gh workflow run' in script_text,
    'has_commit_state': 'def commit_state()' in script_text,
    'has_workflow_key': isinstance(data, dict) and bool(data.get('workflow')),
    'has_inputs': isinstance(data, dict) and isinstance(data.get('inputs'), dict),
}
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem865_false_checks')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
false_count = 0
for k,v in checks.items():
    if not v:
        marker = outdir / ('FALSE_' + k + '.md')
        marker.write_text('# BEM-865 false check\nCheck: ' + k + '\nValue: ' + str(v) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(marker))
        false_count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_FALSE_CHECKS_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-865 false checks\nFalse count: ' + str(false_count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('false checks marked: ' + str(false_count))
"""
No issue comments.
